raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Feather Alert is a public alert system used in California when Native Americans are missing.",
    "California was the third state to enact the Feather Alert public alert system.",
    "AB 1863 seeks to streamline the Feather Alert requesting process and allows a California Tribe to directly request the activation of a Feather Alert.",
    "AB 2138 would create a three-year pilot program permitting tribal law enforcement to obtain state peace officer status under specified conditions.",
    "Peace officer status for tribal law enforcement officers could hasten response times and enhance investigatory power for crimes on reservations.",
    "A federal law known as Public Law 280 (PL 280) enacted in 1953 reduced federal responsibility for public safety on tribal lands.",
    "AB 2695 would require the California Department of Justice to collect and disaggregate domestic violence crime data to better assess the Missing and Murdered Indigenous People crisis.",
    "California ranks fifth in the nation in the number of unresolved and uninvestigated Missing and Murdered Indigenous People cases."
  ]
}
```
